description: ACME addon wiring smoke-test. With acme_staging=true and a fake CF_TOKEN, acme.sh reaches Let's Encrypt staging but the DNS challenge fails — no cert appears at /etc/ssl/addon/fullchain.pem, so the on-start hook (template 342) exits 2 ('cert missing'). expect2fail asserts exactly this: 342 must exit with code 2, anything else (including success or a different failure mode) fails the test. For real cert issuance see nginx/acme-real.
